acceptance_criteria: core-state.json writes use file locking to prevent concurrent corruption
FileServiceHub git init is opt-in, avoiding implicit side effects during concurrent access
Daemon and CLI can safely operate on state simultaneously without data loss
description: Prevent concurrent read-modify-write races on core-state.json when daemon and CLI operate simultaneously. TASK-033 added file locking to core-state.json persistence. TASK-035 made FileServiceHub git init opt-in to avoid contention during concurrent access.
title: Add concurrency-safe state persistence
